description: This pipeline performs basic image preprocessing by applying thresholding operations to the input images. The main steps involve receiving the preprocessed images, applying thresholding and then saving the results.

643c20dc-8134-4f26-a9a3-10a85a2b1fcf.name: data-batch-slicer
643c20dc-8134-4f26-a9a3-10a85a2b1fcf.description:
Merges the incoming data into merging iteration steps. Only outputs the items according to the index range. You can use this to remove duplicates. Annotations are not modified (merged annotations are not copied into the output).

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

de85d661-524d-4e41-8011-7ee5ed12b3ea.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
de85d661-524d-4e41-8011-7ee5ed12b3ea.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

29654c33-973e-4f85-811b-8fcde11f15eb.name: plot-table:plot-histogram
29654c33-973e-4f85-811b-8fcde11f15eb.description: Plots the incoming table(s). This node will create a JFreeChart Histogram plot.

7621ab9b-7d75-458c-9d97-44c8ddb8584e.name: iji-export-image-v2
7621ab9b-7d75-458c-9d97-44c8ddb8584e.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

9d87dc79-ee85-4090-afce-f1eeb3bab685.name: table-remove-columns
9d87dc79-ee85-4090-afce-f1eeb3bab685.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

5404062c-3f36-4fe4-9876-f7f4c6306a2d.name: iji-export-image-v2
5404062c-3f36-4fe4-9876-f7f4c6306a2d.description:
Exports incoming images into a non-JIPipe format (PNG, JPEG, BMP, AVI, TIFF). Please note support for input images depending on the file format:
  • PNG, JPEG, BMP: 2D images only
  • AVI: 2D or 3D images only
  • TIFF: All images supported


This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

da2befc6-204a-4dcf-9673-6bcd79e3ad96.name: table-process-columns
da2befc6-204a-4dcf-9673-6bcd79e3ad96.description: Applies an expression function to all column values. The result of the operation is stored in the same or a new column. It is now recommended to use 'Apply expression to table (columns)' instead of this node.

44af48de-1802-40e8-b3d5-ba3dc278af8b.name: iji-export-table-as-xlsx-v2
44af48de-1802-40e8-b3d5-ba3dc278af8b.description:
Exports a results table to XLSX. Merge multiple tables into the same batch to create a multi-sheet table.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of multiple data items. If you want to group all data into one output, set the matching strategy to 'Custom' and leave 'Data set matching annotations' empty.

7c3c4831-9f7a-4bcc-8a5f-6d5f794be032.name: table-add-columns-generate
7c3c4831-9f7a-4bcc-8a5f-6d5f794be032.description: Adds a new column. By default no changes are applied if the column already exists. Can be optionally configured to replace existing columns.

0b07b7bb-9306-4c66-b3da-0b787f2542ca.name: table-process-columns
0b07b7bb-9306-4c66-b3da-0b787f2542ca.description: Applies an expression function to all column values. The result of the operation is stored in the same or a new column. It is now recommended to use 'Apply expression to table (columns)' instead of this node.
